sections.paragraph:
ἥττημα, ατος, τό (s. prec. entry) (Is 31:8) loss Ro 11:12. ὅλως ἥτ. ὑμῖν ἐστιν it is an utter loss for you 1 Cor 6:7 (Field, Notes 160f).—M-M.

prec. prec. = preceding

Field, Notes Field, Notes = Notes on the Translation of the NT

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 441
